chunks.title: 1.0.0 Beta3
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: iina/iina
Release: 1.0.0 Beta3
Tag: v1.0.0-beta3; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2018-07-25T03:41:04Z; created_at: 2018-07-25T03:36:47Z
Release notes:
> **We have dropped macOS 10.10 Yosemite support starting from this version.**
- Updated FFmpeg to 4.0.1 and bundled youtube-dl.
- Introduced a new design for preferences window.
- Added "Edit" menu because we think it's not a good idea to override system shortcuts like ⌘C and ⌘V.
Shortcuts for quick settings panels have been changed in IINA's default key binding scheme: they are now modified by Shift key, for example ⌘V is now ⇧⌘V. You can still change them back and they will work as usual.
- Added support for adjusting sliders by mousewheel.
- Updated volume control in music mode.
#### Bug fixes and enhancements
It's not possible to cover them all, so only important ones are listed here. Please check out our Git repository if interested.
- Fixed wrong sort key in history window.
- Fixed several bugs where "resuming last playback position" is not respected.
- Use monospaced font for time labels in OSC and Touch Bar.
- Respect "Show remaining time" preference in Music Mode.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the iina/iina release 1.0.0 Beta3 (tag v1.0.0-beta3), macOS 10.10 Yosemite support is dropped. FFmpeg is updated to 4.0.1 and youtube-dl is bundled. A new preferences window design is introduced, an Edit menu is added, and shortcuts for quick settings panels are changed to use the Shift key. Slider adjustment by mousewheel is supported, and volume control in music mode is updated. Bug fixes include correcting sort key in history window, fixing resume playback position issues, using monospaced font for time labels, and respecting 'Show remaining time' in music mode.

This list is incomplete, and only covers several important changes. Please check the commit history on GitHub if interested.
- Added full support for macOS 10.14 Mojave, with two carefully crafted themes (dark and light).
- Redesigned more windows and panels.
- Added more options for the CLI and url scheme.
- Fine-tunes for remote files support.
- Enhanced experience in music mode, including scrolling titles and remembering window layout.
- Reimplemented audio equalizer.
- Fixed various bugs in the new preferences window.
- Fixed all known crashes (except those caused by dependencies) and lots of bugs.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the iina/iina release 1.0.0 Beta4 (tag v1.0.0-beta4), full support for macOS 10.14 Mojave is added with dark and light themes. More windows and panels are redesigned, CLI and URL scheme options are expanded, remote file support is fine-tuned, and music mode is enhanced with scrolling titles and window layout memory. The audio equalizer is reimplemented, bugs in the new preferences window are fixed, and all known crashes except those from dependencies are resolved.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: iina/iina
Release: 1.0.5
Tag: v1.0.5; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2020-01-08T08:17:24Z; created_at: 2020-01-08T07:17:21Z
Release notes:
## 1.0.5
Happy New Year! It has been a while but we now have a new release. Read more about IINA's development at #2686.
### Fixes and updates
- Fixes mini player playtime slider and labels not updating on network resources (#2474)
- Fixes scratched video during animations of entering/exiting full screen after entering pip once.
- Fixes a crash when the initial window size is set to be smaller than the minimum size (#2481, #1913, #2452, #2333)
- Fixes a cell reuse issue in the playlist view.
- Fixes two text overlapping issues (for ru and sv) (#2519)
- Fixes mirror filter does not work (#2581)
- Fixes unresponsiveness, sorry for any inconvenience (#2149)
- Fixes a crash when stream some website and exit with q
- Fixes a crash when quit in lagacy fullscreen (#2396)
- Improves the KeyRecordView in many circumstances (#2610)
- Uses monospace font to display chapter information in the menu (#2424)
- Pauses media when the user is seeking in mini player by dragging progress bar (just like in a normal video window)(#2477)
- Hides info panel when the app is not top-most app (#2598)
- IINA now is compiled using Swift 5 (#2378)
- Updates German, Ukrainian, Czech and zh-Hant localization (#2478, #2446, #2445, #2525)
- Updates mpv to 0.31.0, with FFmpeg 4.2.1
- Updates youtube-dl
- Adds Polish localization (#2500)
- Adds Turkish localization (#2640)
### SHA256
```
04958c157ee3e71ae822e2ea471f6277b8f2b9b12bb3cc46fd769d9a4f30a05b
```
----
#### IINA is now notarized so that no warning will show when you try to install it on Catalina.
Due to the more strict security requirement of notarization, it cannot load dylibs automatically from your system path anymore. This might be a breaking change if you previously use your custom mpv build by only deleting the `libmpv.1.dylib` from IINA's package. Since IINA 1.0.5, you must **copy** the custom `libmpv.1.dylib` to `IINA.app/Contents/Frameworks`, replacing the original one.
#### We are using a new translation platform powered by Crowdin.
Now everyone can contribute to IINA's localization, and translators don't need to deal with code and pull requests anymore. Have a try at [translate.iina.io](https://translate.iina.io)!
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the iina/iina release 1.0.5 (tag v1.0.5), fixes and updates include fixing mini player playtime slider and labels not updating on network resources, fixing scratched video during full screen animations after PiP, fixing a crash when initial window size is too small, fixing a cell reuse issue in playlist view, fixing text overlapping issues, fixing mirror filter, fixing unresponsiveness, fixing crashes when streaming and quitting, fixing a crash when quitting in legacy full screen, improving KeyRecordView, using monospace font for chapter info in menu, pausing media when seeking in mini player by dragging progress bar, hiding info panel when app is not top-most, compiling with Swift 5, updating German, Ukrainian, Czech, and zh-Hant localizations, updating mpv to 0.31.0 with FFmpeg 4.2.1, updating youtube-dl, and adding Polish and Turkish localizations. The release is notarized for Catalina, requiring custom mpv builds to be copied into the app bundle. A new Crowdin-based translation platform is introduced.

chunks.title: IINA 1.0.7 beta 1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: iina/iina
Release: IINA 1.0.7 beta 1
Tag: v1.0.7-beta1; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2020-03-04T18:57:20Z; created_at: 2020-02-28T03:11:50Z
Release notes:
### New
- Adds an option to accept first mouse or not (#2332)
- Catalan language support
- Adds a remove button in the playlist to remove individual playlist items.
- Music mode now supports mouse scroll controls (#2157)
### Fixes
- Fixes format PopupButton can't be clicked (#2642)
- Fixes OSC sometimes does not disappear (#2750)
- Fixes a possible infinite loop when matching subtitles (#2531)
- Seeking in Touch Bar no longer resumes playback if it wasn’t playing before seeking (#2767)
- Fixes a crash when scrolling in the playlist containing too many items (#2745)
- Fixes an issue that prevents from enabling saved audio filters (#2729), and do not ask the user to turn off hardware decoding when enabling an audio filter (#2731)
- Fixes an issue where the window jumps to the focused screen when changing the playing file (#2749)
- Fixes various issue regarding window size in music mode (#2771)
- Mini player now behave more like the main player (e.g. switch “now playing” correctly) (#2772)
### Improvements
- Improves performance when deleting histories (#2722)
- Make most of the input fields continuously update their value (#2716)
- For consistency considerations, single-click on chapter no longer jumps to the chapter; it requires a double-click now (#2734)
- Double-click online subtitles to download (#2706)
- IINA can now remember the position of the inspector panel, instead of showing on the rightmost every time.
- The welcome window now shows a vertical scroller in the history table (#2715)
- IINA no longer shows the last video’s frame when opening a new video (#2197, #2498, #2469)
### Updates
- Various localization updates from Crowdin
- Update mpv to 0.32.0
This is the first time we incorporate translations from Crowdin, where we have more contributors. If you find any translation can be improved, please register an account at [translate.iina.io](translate.iina.io) for free and help us to translate, upvote, or downvote.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the iina/iina release IINA 1.0.7 beta 1 (tag v1.0.7-beta1), new features include an option to accept first mouse click, Catalan language support, a remove button in the playlist, and mouse scroll controls in music mode. Fixes address format PopupButton clickability, OSC disappearance, infinite loop when matching subtitles, Touch Bar seeking resuming playback, crash when scrolling large playlist, enabling saved audio filters, window jumping to focused screen on file change, window size issues in music mode, and mini player behavior. Improvements include performance when deleting histories, continuous update of input fields, double-click to jump to chapter, double-click to download online subtitles, remembering inspector panel position, vertical scroller in welcome window history table, and not showing last video's frame when opening new video. mpv is updated to 0.32.0, and translations from Crowdin are incorporated.

Repository: iina/iina
Release: IINA 1.1.0
Tag: v1.1.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2020-10-13T10:24:53Z; created_at: 2020-10-11T09:09:02Z
Release notes:
### New
- Updated user interface and icons for macOS Big Sur
- Added a window showing highlights in the current release
- Added an icon in the title bar to indicate ontop status
- Added “hardware decoding” and “deinterlace” switches in the sidebar
- IINA now shows a preview after screenshot
- Added an option to force dedicated GPU (#2982, #2919)
- The Touch Bar item “remaining time” can show either remaining time or total duration (#1312)
- Updated appearance of the main window when the video is playing in pip mode (#2980)
- Added “toggle pip mode” as a mouse action (#2350)
- Shows music metadata in the playlist (#2979)
- Added tooltips to playlist entries and chapters (#3001)
- Supports “custom” crop size in the main menu (#3019)
- Supports displaying more precise time and duration in the control bar
- The current filename is displayed aside time and battery info in full screen
- Handle URLs with schemes other than `iina://` (#3118)
### Fixes
- Fixed an issue where the main window shows black screen after entering pip mode when the video track is an album art
- Fixed an issue that some shortcuts are not useable in the Playback History window
- Fixed a UI issue where the “Aspect Ratio” label is misplaced in the quick setting - video tab, if there are more - than three video tracks (#3020)
- Fixed PlaylistLoop button state not updating with the menu item (#2973)
- Fixed a bug where the thumbnails do not respect the video rotation (#3015, #2817, #2442)
- Fixed the subtitle language token field not saving its contents (#3128)
- Fixed too frequent updates to the now playing widget (#3096)
- Fixed URLs getting escaped when drag&dropped to the playlist
### Improvements
- Remember pause/playing state before entering interactive mode (#2887)
- Prevent “Additional mpv options” table from showing multiple lines
- The volume icon now changes with the volume to indicate the magnitude of the volume (#2930)
- Added tooltips for some icons (#2871)
- Changing the OSD size now makes the OSD subtitle change as well (#2986)
- Show “Enable advanced settings” as a switch for macOS 10.15+
- Show volume popover when scrolling to adjust the volume in the mini-player (#2999, #2191)
- Add “.aif” to the supported extension list (#2895)
- Improve performance when taking screenshots
- No longer shows a fatal error when trying to create an existing screenshot (#3032)
- Don't pause when auto-playing the next playlist item if enabled the "pause when media opened" option
### Updates
- Updated mpv and youtube-dl
- Updated FFmpeg from 4.2.2 to 4.3.1; add support for dav1d decoder (#3079, #2740, #2223)
- Updated the icons in the on-screen controller
**SHA256**
```
44346b32137be39f74206181a370dac28ff0ae645d2c809f136f019b11863e27
```

Repository: iina/iina

Tag: v1.3.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-11-07T03:46:55Z; created_at: 2022-11-07T03:34:17Z
Release notes:
## Release Notes
### New
*   Added language support for Afrikaans, Danish, English - United Kingdom, Finnish, Hungarian, Portuguese, and Serbian (Latin)
*   You can now control whether HDR support is enabled by default in the preferences ([#3808](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3808))
### Fixes
*   Fixed full-screen option exists as 2 instances under different menu items ([#3857](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3857))
*   Fixed error message "Cannot prevent display sleep!" ([#3842](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3842))
*   Fixed Playback History searches don't work for capital letters ([#3800](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3800))
*   Fixed Crash in `NowPlayingInfoManager` during termination ([#3607](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3607))
*   Fixed `NSFileHandleOperationException` crash in logger during termination ([#3590](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3590))
*   Fixed "seconds to prefetch" displays wrong default value ([#3784](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3784))
*   Fixed blank window entering Picture-in-Picture while pausing ([#3973](https://github.com/iina/iina/pull/3973))
*   Fixed random failure to resume last playback position ([#3939](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3939))
*   Fixed IINA incorrectly reports "No subtitles found" using Open Subtitles ([#3907](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3907))
*   Fixed IINA displays subtitles for all episodes of a TV show ([#3908](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3908))
*   Fixed time info not available when entering music mode while pausing ([#3984](https://github.com/iina/iina/pull/3984))
*   Fixed "Saved Audio Filters" disabled in music mode ([#3818](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3818))
*   Fixed HDR sometimes not working ([#3806](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3806))
*   Fixed HDR video becoming dark in full screen in macOS Ventura ([#3844](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3844))
*   Fixed the progress bar overlaps with the thumbnail preview ([#3911](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3911))
*   Fixed various keybinding related issues ([#3831](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3831), [#3881](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3881), [#3851](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3851))
### Improvements
*   Do not update the on screen controller when it is hidden, improved the performance ([#3601](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3601))
*   "Show Quick Settings Panel" has been renamed to "Show Video Panel" under the video menu (same for audio and subtitles menus)([#3980](https://github.com/iina/iina/pull/3980))
*   The menu item now cycles from "Show" and "Hide" to reflect the current state ([#3116](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/3116))
**Deprecation Notice**
Xcode 14 now only supports building for macOS 10.13 and above. We will work towards possible solutions, but please be aware that we may have to drop support for macOS 10.11 and 10.12 in future releases. IINA 1.3.1 might be the last version that supports macOS 10.12 Sierra.
**GitHub Sponsors**
We are testing the [GitHub sponsors](https://github.com/sponsors/iina) program. If you like IINA, please consider sponsoring us on GitHub. The money will be used to pay for the Apple Developer Program and domain/server expenses. More ways to donate will be added in the future.
## Downloads
**SHA256**
```
c646642a2884cb0516922170e0f6d4990b12b41d6244b08d53f318dbb9518c2f
```

Fixes address full-screen option existing as 2 instances under different menu items, error message 'Cannot prevent display sleep!', Playback History searches not working for capital letters, crash in NowPlayingInfoManager during termination, NSFileHandleOperationException crash in logger during termination, 'seconds to prefetch' displaying wrong default value, blank window entering PiP while pausing, random failure to resume last playback position, IINA incorrectly reporting 'No subtitles found' using Open Subtitles, IINA displaying subtitles for all episodes of a TV show, time info not available when entering music mode while pausing, 'Saved Audio Filters' disabled in music mode, HDR sometimes not working, HDR video becoming dark in full screen in macOS Ventura, progress bar overlapping with thumbnail preview, and various keybinding related issues. Improvements include not updating on screen controller when hidden, renaming 'Show Quick Settings Panel' to 'Show Video Panel' under video menu, and menu item cycling from 'Show' to 'Hide' to reflect current state. A deprecation notice warns that macOS 10.11 and 10.12 support may be dropped in future releases.

Release notes:

## Bug fixes

- Fixed filter parameters appears randomly [#4262](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/4262)
## Improvements
- When loading subtitles, the open panel always starts in the video's directory [#4382](https://github.com/iina/iina/issues/4382)

chunks.title: IINA 1.3.5
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: iina/iina
Release: IINA 1.3.5
Tag: v1.3.5; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-06-01T04:35:27Z; created_at: 2024-05-26T05:36:52Z
Release notes:
## New
- Added a single file repeat feature #4242, #4350.
- When downloading subtitles, the FPS for each subtitle is shown #4763. The subtitle result window is now wider #4057.
- Added a "Load External Audio" menu item #4843.
- Added a key binding to bind the `R` key to `sub-pos +1` in the default IINA config #4823. Also added key bindings for changing subtitle font size #4824.
## Bug fixes
- Fixed the "seek exact" command sometimes not working correctly #3710.
- Fixed a crash when clicking on the chapter menu #4696.
- Fixed the play button state in the mini player not syncing #4743.
- Fixed advanced settings not being searchable #4512.
- Fixed the "Open Recent" menu being cleared when opening a non-release version of IINA #4688.
- Fixed the cursor disappearing after clicking in the main window #4748.
- Fixed the OSC not being clickable when moved to specific positions #4156. Also fixed OSC responses even when behind another view #4612.
- Fixed a regression where the "Include Subtitles" setting for screenshots was not respected #4582.
- Fixed `iina-cli` not working due to percent-encoding issues after macOS Sonoma #4861.
- Fixed IINA being unable to pause the video when the system goes to sleep #4917.
- Fixed the subtitle border size option not accepting decimal numbers #4799.
## Improvements
- The open/save dialogs now block window input while open #4590.
- Tweaked the layout of the settings sidebar #4750.
- Improved the UX of the "Jump to..." command #4084.
- Avoided excessive playlist refreshes #4769.
- The audio track picker can now accept video files again #3259.
- Internationalized the subtitles override levels #4892.
- Made all volume icons indicate the current volume level #4885.
### Deprecation Notice
IINA 1.3.5 now requires macOS 10.13 High Sierra. Due to the [bumped system requirement of mpv](https://github.com/mpv-player/mpv/releases/tag/v0.37.0), starting with the next major release, IINA will require macOS 10.15 Catalina.
### Donations
IINA is developed and maintained by a dedicated team of volunteers who contribute their time to create the best media player for macOS. Your support plays a crucial role in helping us achieve this goal. If you find IINA valuable and would like to contribute to its ongoing development, please consider making a donation. We are now accepting donations from [GitHub Sponsors](https://github.com/sponsors/iina), [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/iina_app), and [Liberapay](https://liberapay.com/iina_app). Every contribution, no matter the size, makes a significant difference. Thank you for your support!
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the iina/iina release IINA 1.3.5 (tag v1.3.5), new features include a single file repeat feature, showing FPS for each subtitle when downloading and wider subtitle result window, a 'Load External Audio' menu item, key binding for sub-pos +1 and changing subtitle font size. Bug fixes address 'seek exact' command not working correctly, crash when clicking on chapter menu, play button state in mini player not syncing, advanced settings not being searchable, 'Open Recent' menu being cleared when opening non-release version, cursor disappearing after clicking in main window, OSC not clickable when moved to specific positions and responding behind another view, regression where 'Include Subtitles' setting for screenshots was not respected, iina-cli not working due to percent-encoding issues after macOS Sonoma, IINA unable to pause when system goes to sleep, and subtitle border size option not accepting decimal numbers. Improvements include open/save dialogs blocking window input, tweaked settings sidebar layout, improved UX of 'Jump to...' command, avoiding excessive playlist refreshes, audio track picker accepting video files again, internationalized subtitles override levels, and all volume icons indicating current volume level. A deprecation notice states that IINA 1.3.5 requires macOS 10.13 High Sierra and the next major release will require macOS 10.15 Catalina.

- The new [User Scripts](https://github.com/iina/plugin-userscript) plugin allows you to tweak IINA's functionality with only a few lines of code.
Learn more about plugins and how to write your own at https://iina.io/plugins/.
## New
- Added support for Hebrew #4867, Croatian #4966, and Indonesian locales.

- Fixed "cycle-values" commands not showing values in readableCommand.

- The find online subtitle OSD is always displayed regardless of the OSD setting #4992.
- UI improvements to key bindings and advanced tabs #4129.
- Fix wobbling when the window is being resized during video playback #4667.
- Improvements to the subtitle chooser #4833.
- Remove the resize animation on opening media and switching music/video modes #5054.

questions.query_text: Across the iina/iina releases, how does the HDR support described in IINA 1.3.0 differ from the HDR-related changes described in IINA 1.3.1?

options.text: 1.3.0 adds HDR support for M1 Pro/Max MacBooks, while 1.3.1 adds an option to control whether HDR support is enabled by default and fixes HDR sometimes not working and HDR video becoming dark in full screen in macOS Ventura.
1.3.0 removes HDR support entirely, while 1.3.1 reintroduces it with tone mapping settings.
Both releases only update FFmpeg without any HDR-specific changes.
1.3.0 adds HDR support for all Macs, while 1.3.1 adds HDR support for M1 Pro/Max MacBooks.

questions.expected_answer: 1.3.0 adds HDR support for M1 Pro/Max MacBooks, while 1.3.1 adds an option to control whether HDR support is enabled by default and fixes HDR sometimes not working and HDR video becoming dark in full screen in macOS Ventura.

answer_support.answer_text: Added HDR support for M1 Pro/Max Macbook 14/16
You can now control whether HDR support is enabled by default in the preferences ... Fixed HDR sometimes not working ... Fixed HDR video becoming dark in full screen in macOS Ventura

questions.query_text: In the iina/iina release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds a logging system to make debugging easier, (2) a release that introduces a new design for the preferences window and drops macOS 10.10 Yosemite support, (3) a release that adds full support for macOS 10.14 Mojave with dark and light themes, (4) a release that fixes a crash on quit and adds Ukrainian localization.

answer_support.answer_text: Added a logging system to make debugging easier
We have dropped macOS 10.10 Yosemite support ... Introduced a new design for preferences window
Added full support for macOS 10.14 Mojave, with two carefully crafted themes (dark and light)
Fixed a crash on quit ... added Ukrainian localization
